props.message:
SPRAWL OUTPOST

A single guardpost at the edge of the Sprawl. The merchants pay her wages. She does not pretend to like the merchants.

The sister-watch on the Crown is older. The watches keep an open door.

Posted on a small board:

'The watch keeps. The watch is paid in pebbles. The watch would keep regardless.'

root.speaker: Outpost Sentinel Quenn
root.text:
*she nods once. The hand on the spear does not move.*

Walker. The Outpost is kept. Pass through if you've a reason. Don't if you don't.

watch.speaker: Outpost Sentinel Quenn
watch.text:
Whatever the merchants have decided to be afraid of this season. Mostly other merchants.

The sister-watch up on the Crown — her hall is older than this one. The walk between is open. The watches keep open doors.

alone.speaker: Outpost Sentinel Quenn
alone.text:
Alone enough. The sister-watch can hear me if I call. So can the realm.

I don't call often.

bye.speaker: Outpost Sentinel Quenn
bye.text: Walk well. The watch is kept.
